Source: Azure AI Foundry Documentation
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-studio/
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Microsoft Foundry Documentation

## Overview
Microsoft Foundry (formerly Azure AI Studio) — "The AI app and agent factory - build, optimize, and govern AI apps and agents at scale."

## Key Components

### Foundry Models
- Models sold directly by Azure
- Multiple deployment types
- DeepSeek-R1 support
- Fine-tuning capabilities

### Foundry Agent Service
- Orchestrate and host AI agents for business processes
- Multi-agent templates
- AI Red Teaming Agent (preview)

### Foundry Control Plane
- Trustworthy AI and Content Safety
- Application tracing and observability
- Agentic workflow evaluation
- Generative AI monitoring dashboards

### Foundry IQ
- Knowledge base connections for agents
- What is Foundry IQ section now present
- FAQ section added

### Foundry Tools
- Speech, Translator, Language, Document Intelligence
- Content Understanding, Face/Vision

### Azure Machine Learning
- Model training
- ML pipelines orchestration
- AutoML

### Foundry Local
- Run LLMs on local devices
- HuggingFace model compilation
- SDK documentation

### SDKs
- Python, C#, JavaScript, Java

Last updated: 2026-03-11
